The '''siege of an Imperial Galactic Rim shipyard''' took place during the [[Operation Shadow Hand]] in [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]] 

==The battle==
The siege involved a massive [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] force besieging a great [[Unidentified Imperial shipyard|Imperial shipyard]] under control of the [[Dark Empire]] located in the [[Galactic Rim/Legends|Galactic Rim]].<ref name="EE1" />

The troopship ''[[Pelagia]]'' was scheduled to rendezvous with an [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] [[Flight group/Legends|flight group]] based in the [[Ottega system/Legends|Ottega system]] and then proceed to aid the invasion force. The ship and its passengers was [[Destruction of the Pelagia|destroyed]] when it was hit by a missile shot from the [[Galaxy Gun]].<ref name="EE1" />
